theme: Build a word with exactly the target borders
title: Realize the Border Set
strategies: trivial: ignore targets, cycle through the K allowed letters
greedy: naive prefix=suffix stitching per target border, processed in input order, oblivious to interactions

strong: compute the Fine-and-Wilf forcing closure of the target periods, then realize exactly that closure via a union-find letter assignment (one distinct letter per equivalence class, up to the alphabet budget)
